---
title: "test_network_contracts.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\test_network_contracts.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.90
---

## Intent
The `test_network_contracts.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestNetwork_contracts, setUp, tearDown, test_transition. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestNetwork_contracts, setUp, tearDown, test_transition. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [io](file://io)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.tools.network_watcher](file://src.tools.network_watcher)

### Exports
- `TestNetwork_contracts`
- `setUp`
- `tearDown`
- `test_transition`
